title: NPC-delivery quest (v3)
description: An errand where a giver NPC hands the player a package item to carry to a receiver NPC standing in another zone. Completing the delivery (QUEST DELIVER while in the receiver's room with the package in hand) grants gold, XP and an optional title. Schema version 1 is a kill quest, version 2 is an item-collection delivery quest; this version 3 covers NPC-to-NPC package delivery. Quests are stored as data/quests/quest.<id>.json and the loader tolerates unknown properties.

type.description: Optional human-readable discriminator. The effective type is derived from which fields are populated.

id.description: Unique quest id, referenced by a dialogue response's 'grant_quest_id'.

name.description: Display name shown to the player.

description.description: Short flavour description of the errand.

giver_npc_id.description: Mob template id of the NPC who hands over the package (informational; the grant is wired via a dialogue response).

receiver_npc_id.description: Mob template id of the NPC the package must be delivered to. Must be present in receiver_room_id at delivery time.

receiver_room_id.description: Room id where the receiver NPC stands. The player must be here to complete the delivery.

package_item_id.description: Item id of the package handed to the player on grant and consumed on delivery.

title_reward.description: Optional title granted to the player on completion.
